findings.summary: llmx Python API import failed twice — editable-installed package not discoverable from skills repo venv
findings.evidence: CC 07231221: model-review.py failed 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named llmx', then 'No module named google' (transitive dep). Required glob-based site-packages bootstrap from uv tool venv. Fix took 3 iterations.
findings.proposed_fix: NEW. Bootstrap pattern now in model-review.py. Extract to shared snippet or add llmx as dep in skills pyproject.toml.

findings.summary: GPT-5.4 with reasoning rejects temperature!=1.0 — hardcoded 0.7 caused 400 error on first real dispatch
findings.evidence: CC 07231221: model-review.py produced '400 - Unsupported value: temperature does not support 0.7'. Documented in PROMPTING_GPT.md but _call_llmx defaulted to 0.7.
findings.proposed_fix: NEW. Fixed in b794362. Model-specific constraints need programmatic enforcement, not just documentation.

findings.summary: Structured extraction schema failed on both Google and OpenAI — additionalProperties and missing required fields
findings.evidence: CC 07231221: Google API rejected additionalProperties, GPT strict mode required 'line' in required array. Schema committed without probe against either API.
findings.proposed_fix: RECURRING (3rd). Probe-before-build rule (#8) applies to response_format schemas too. Run 1-item probe against each target API before committing.

findings.summary: 4 consecutive SendMessage calls failed — agent didn't load tool schema first
findings.evidence: CC 07231221: 4x SendMessage without required 'summary' param. Used ToolSearch but still failed. Fell back to reading output files. ~8 wasted tool calls.
findings.proposed_fix: NEW. Load deferred tool schema via ToolSearch and READ the result before first invocation. Or just read subagent output files directly.

findings.summary: Gemini CLI auth fails with ProjectIdRequiredError every dispatch — silent API fallback adds 60s+ latency
findings.evidence: CC 07231221: Every llmx.api.chat() call to Gemini shows 'cli->api gemini exited 1: ProjectIdRequiredError' before falling back to API. Not blocking but adds overhead and stderr noise.
findings.proposed_fix: NEW. Set GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT env var, or configure llmx to skip CLI backend for Google when API key is available.
